name: rivalsearchmcp
description: Multi-engine research tools for Claude Code — web, social, news, academic, GitHub, and document processing. No API keys.

plugins.name: rival-search-mcp
plugins.description: 9 research tools: 5-engine web search, 9 social platforms, 5 news sources, 5 academic databases, GitHub, website mapping, document analysis, and research topic synthesis. No API keys required.

plugins.name: rival-search-mcp-skills
plugins.description: Agent skill and CLI helpers for RivalSearchMCP research workflows. Install separately from the MCP server plugin.
